gigapan.description:
For some reason Johannes thinks that Vapino is the best place to have lunch. Considering all of the culinary options, I've eaten a disproportionate share of my lunches at Vapino. So here it is!

Theobaldgasse 19, 1060 Wien, Austria

Taken 12/13/2009
